text:
16 PRs merged this week. The bots are officially taking over (Discord, Telegram, and something called a "Suspicious Helper"). We also saw AI getting squeezed onto ESP32-S3 microcontrollers, some desktop novel generators, and much-needed fixes to auth sync and diary dates (no more time-traveling 404s).

Check out the new apps in the repo. You all are building weird and wonderful things. Keep it up. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #microcontrollers #botdevelopment #buildinpublic #retroaesthetic
